**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: DevOps Engineer | Stockholm
description:
Are you a senior
 **DevOps Engineer** 
 eager to drive innovation and shape cutting‑edge software solutions?
 



  





 Join us at ALTEN Sweden in Stockholm, where you will work with cutting-edge technologies to shape a sustainable future alongside world-leading automotive companies.
 



  





 As a DevOps Engineer on our team, you will play a key role in designing, automating, and maintaining infrastructure and deployment pipelines using Python, Terraform, and Ansible. You'll manage and optimize CI/CD workflows with Jenkins, and support both development and operations within a microservices-based architecture.
 



 Your responsibilities will also include working extensively with AWS services such as S3 or Azure cloud, Lambda, RDS, and EC2, ensuring scalable, secure, and resilient cloud infrastructure. Additionally, you'll leverage Docker and Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration, enabling fast, reliable, and automated deployments.
 



  





**WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR** 




 To be a strong match for this role, we’re looking for someone with at least 3 years of experience in DevOps. Beyond being passionate about the field, we value candidates who are communicative, responsive, and collaborative. We also expect experience with:
 



  




* Python
* GoLang or Bash
* AWS or Azure
* CI/CD
* Docker or Kubernetes
* Git or Jenkins



  





 It’s a plus if you also have:
 


* Experience working in agile environments
* Swedish language skills



  





  





**ABOUT ALTEN** 




 ALTEN is one of Europe's largest engineering and IT consulting companies, with over 57,000 employees in approximately 30 countries. Our engineers carry out complex and highly technical projects throughout the product development chain for leading companies in a variety of industries, such as Automotive, Defense & Security, Energy, Industrial Equipment, Public Service, and Life Sciences. In Sweden, we have around 1,300 dedicated employees with nine offices in nine cities – from Lund in the south to Skellefteå in the north.
 



  





 For the fifth year in a row, ALTEN has been named one of Sweden's most attractive employers by Karriärföretagen, an award for employers who offer unique career and development opportunities.
 



  





  





 Welcome to read more about us at alten.se

title: Platschef
description:
**Company Description**

 OHLA Group is a global leader in the construction industry with over 110 years of experience, specializing in transport infrastructure, engineering projects, and distinctive buildings. Operating in the USA, Europe, and Latin America, OHLA is committed to innovation and excellence while fostering progress and well-being in the communities it serves. The organization places a strong emphasis on environmental and social responsibility, as well as the development and support of its employees. OHLA also has a presence in industrial services, concessions, and first-class tourism development projects.
   




**Role Description**

 The Platschef will oversee daily construction site operations in Stockholm, ensuring that projects are managed efficiently, on schedule, within budget, and in compliance with safety and quality standards. Responsibilities include coordinating teams, monitoring project progress, managing resources, and maintaining excellent communication with all stakeholders, including clients, subcontractors, and suppliers. This is a full-time, on-site position requiring close collaboration with various teams to deliver outstanding results.
   




**Qualifications**
* Experience in Customer Satisfaction and Customer Service to ensure high-quality outcomes and maintain stakeholder relationships.
* Strong Communication skills to effectively liaise with team members, subcontractors, and clients.
* Expertise in Budgeting to control project costs and allocate resources efficiently.
* Proven ability in Training and mentoring teams to develop skills and improve site operations.
* Strong leadership and organizational skills to effectively manage and guide diverse teams.
* Comprehensive understanding of construction industry standards and regulations.
* Proficiency in relevant project management software and tools is preferred.
* Bachelor’s degree in Construction Management, Civil Engineering, or a related field is preferred.
* Fluency in Swedish and English is required for this role.

title: Product Owner Game Engine SDK
description:
**Company Overview**
 Metrea delivers effects-as-a-service to national security partners across five domains and more than a dozen mission areas—including airborne ISR, electronic warfare, secure communications, aerial refueling, special mission aviation, aerial firefighting, and advanced simulation.
   

  

 Wherever we operate, we build vertically integrated full stacks of capability—designing, building, and operating turnkey solutions that let customers scale capacity while benefiting from continuous cycles of innovation. With operators and engineers under one roof, we close the gap between lab and field—what we call connecting design with effect.
   

  

 Metrea’s solutions are built for elegance: effective, efficient, and evolving. This approach enables our partners to do more with less and achieve outsized, asymmetric advantage against rapidly evolving threats.
   

  

 Headquartered in Washington, DC, Metrea has facilities across the United States, the United Kingdom, Europe, and beyond.
   

  

 Group Overview
   

  

 This role sits within the Digital and Synthetic Capability Unit (D&S) which is committed to providing mission-driven information solutions that seamlessly bridge the digital and physical realms. Leveraging cutting-edge technologies and advanced platforms, we empower operational readiness and elevate situational awareness across diverse domains—including air, maritime, and space.
   

  

 Position Summary
   

  

 In this role you will be driving the quality of our Core software development kits (SDKs) that encapsulate game engines, bleeding edge simulation and modern developer tools. You will understand from a product perspective why well-designed SDKs augment and accelerate development teams coupled with understanding the implications of working with modern, complex game engines. This will be achieved by combining a technical background with cross functional production experience that will enable you to balance implementation of long-term strategy with day-to-day delivery pressure. You will be providing agile direction to talented engineering teams whilst collaborating with the product lead in setting the future direction for the platform. You will own and drive the product development of the core SDK platform that is used by internal and external teams to build other simulation products on top of it. You will be successful if you can balance and leverage the affordances of game engine technology with the demands required for high fidelity simulation offered through a mature and extensive suite of developer tools.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own and evolve the product vision, roadmap, and backlog for the SDK platform
* Work closely and actively engage with multiple development teams and subject matter experts to gather requirements and validate product direction
* Translate requirements into clear user stories and technical requirements for development teams
* Understand the implications and application of different agile frameworks like Scrum and Kanban
* Collaborate with developers, artists, designers, and simulation engineers working in game engine environments (e.g. Unreal Engine)
* Prioritize features that balance commercial impact, user feedback, and technical complexity
* Ensure product alignment with long term architecture goals, interoperability standards, and Defence compliance needs
* Drive user testing, acceptance criteria, and feedback sessions with end users and military stakeholders


 What You Bring
   

  

* Previous technical background as a developer in C++ and/or game engines
* Previous experience working with developer tools and SDKs is critical
* Practical experience of product development, release management, and stakeholder engagement
* 4+ years’ production experience is highly preferred, particularly with managing multiple highly technical teams
* Highly organised and proactive with the ability to own backlogs across multiple technical teams
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills with the ability to support the product lead with data on day-to-day delivery and product direction
* Experienced with agile development practices and project management tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence)
* Experience working in cross-functional teams with developers, artists, and designers


**In addition to the above, any of the following would be beneficial:**
* Experience with or a strong interest in simulation, training systems that utilise game engines are an advantage
* Familiarity with Unreal Engine


**Additional Eligibility Qualifications**
* Comfortable with Hybrid working
* Experience working with military or government organisations, products or services
* Willingness to travel, Metrea is an international organisation with offices and stakeholders in the US, UK and Europe


**Benefits**
* Friskvård of 5K annually
* Parental leave Metrea Management Limited.
* Occupational pension (swe. tjänstepension)
* 30 days of leave
* Bonus Scheme
* Personal development opportunities


 Work Authorization / Security Clearance
   

  

 The employee will have the legal right to work in the (relevant country) and will be able to produce right to work documentation.
   

  

 AAP/EEO Statement
   

  

 Metrea Simulations AB is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or other characteristics protected by law.
   

  

 Position Type and Expected Hours of Work
   

  

 This is a full-time non-exempt position with typical working hours of Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. Hours and work shifts may change in accordance with department and business needs. Exempt Employees must have the ability to be on-call and available, as business needs require. Non-Exempt employees may be required to work over 40 hours per week with approval from the department manager.
   

  

 Work Location
   

  

 Stockholm
   

  

 Work Environment
   

  

 This job operates in an office setting.
   

  

 Travel
   

  

 Occasionally required.
   

  

 Our Firmware
   

  

 At Metrea, our single core value, Rooted in Humility, and our four cornerstone attributes—Entrepreneurial, Systematic, Discerning, and Over-Deliver. These form what we call our Teammate Firmware. Just like technical firmware connects software and hardware, our Firmware is the constant interface between our mission and our people. It defines how we show up, how we work together, and how we solve complex problems.
   

  

 Our team Firmware creates a web-like, hyper-collaborative, dynamically hierarchical way of working that helps us adapt quickly, communicate openly, and distribute decision-making to where expertise actually lives. It enables groups to self-organize around hard problems, shift fluidly as priorities evolve, and operate with the trust, curiosity, and discipline required in a complex mission space. This foundation allows us to deliver elegant, effective solutions and uphold our purpose: protecting our precious inheritance.

title: Senior nätverkstekniker till IT-driftenheten i Upplands Väsby kommun
description:
Vill du bli en del av ett självgående och erfaret team som ansvarar för drift, förvaltning och utveckling av kommunens komplexa nätverksinfrastruktur? Vill du ha eget ansvar och arbeta i stora och små uppdrag med allt från att utveckla och införa nya funktioner till att hjälpa kommunens olika verksamheter med deras behov? Läs då mer om oss och sök tjänsten nedan!
   

  





**Vi erbjuder dig**




 IT i Upplands Väsby kommun präglas av prestigelöshet, lösningsfokus och kreativitet. Väsby vågar och gör, är vår kommundevis. Generellt ligger vi långt fram i vårt utnyttjande av teknik inom den kommunala sektorn. Beslutsvägarna är korta och flexibiliteten är hög, något som möjliggörs av god upparbetad tillit från våra verksamheter, kompetenta kolleger och en robust teknisk infrastruktur.
   

  





**Om oss**




 Det här är en tjänst för dig som motiveras av att arbeta med alla ingående delar av modern IT-drift och du blir en av åtta medarbetare i IT-driftenheten. Digitaliseringen inom Upplands Väsby kommun drivs verksamhetsnära, vilket innebär att förvaltningsledare och utvecklingsledare inom olika verksamheter ansvarar för att driva verksamhetsutveckling med stöd från oss. Din roll går bland annat ut på se till att denna utveckling kan ske på en kvalificerad infrastruktur.
   

  





**Om tjänsten**




 Dina arbetsdagar kommer vara varierande, du kommer arbeta med allt från design och införande av nya funktioner, övervakning, analys, felsökning, till att hantera incidenter. Med utgångpunkt från ditt skrivbord kommer du att röra dig över hela kommunen, arbeta i kommunens olika kontor såväl som med kollegor på skolor, boenden och i andra offentliga lokaler.
   

  





 I rollen som senior nätverkstekniker kommer du tillsammans med kollegorna inom verksamheten att drifta, supporta, förändra och utveckla vår nätverksinfrastruktur. Det är viktigt att du tar egna initiativ och kan leda kollegor framåt i olika uppdrag inom ditt arbetsområde.
   

  





 Kommunal verksamhet är en viktig samhällsfunktion vilket speglas i vår IT plattform som bygger på flera olika tekniker som on-premise, moln och allt där emellan.
   

  





 Vi tillämpar arbete med utgångspunkt från vårt kontor i centrala Upplands Väsby, viss flexibilitet att arbeta på distans finns. Tjänsten kommer innebära viss beredskapstjänstgöring.
   

  





**Är du den vi söker:**




 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Relevant teknisk utbildning inom nätverks- och brandsväggsteknik (motsvarande CCNP eller Aruba Certified Professional)
* Flera års arbetserfarenhet av liknande tjänst i komplexa nätverksmiljöer
* God kommunikationsförmåga, det vill säga förmåga att ödmjukt diskutera tekniska utmaningar och förslag till lösningar med såväl tekniska specialister som med kollegor utan teknisk bakgrund.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
* B-körkort



 Det är meriterande om du har kunskap om och erfarenhet av att arbeta med:
 


* Aruba, HPE-switchar och routrar
* Brandväggar som Checkpoint och Sonicwall
* VPN och DAG
* Avrop och upphandling



 Vi söker dig med förmåga att snabbt sätta sig in i tekniska utmaningar och med ett lösningsorienterat mindset. Självklart är du genuint tekniskt intresserad med stor nyfikenhet på tillämpning av ny teknik. Din bakgrund inom tekniken har gett dig kunskaper du gärna använder i nya lösningar, men eget driv och uthållighet är lika viktiga som erfarenhet. För att trivas i rollen behöver du vara strukturerad och kunna organisera ditt arbete effektivt för att hålla deadlines. En god slutledningsförmåga, att vara analytisk med sinne för detaljer är ett stort plus!
   

  





 Arbetsprov kan förekomma.
   

  





****Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!****




 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via vårt rekryteringssystem. Bakgrundskontroller kan förekomma under rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  





 Läs mer om våra kontor och arbetsplatser: Kommunens arbetsplatser
   

  





 Möt några av våra medarbetare: Möt våra medarbetare
   

  





 Hos oss får du såväl trygga anställningsvillkor som flera olika personalförmåner, som bland annat friskvårdsbidrag och förmånliga erbjudanden via vår förmånsportal. Mer information finner du på: Kommunen som arbetsgivare
   

  





 Upplands Väsby kommun är ett finskt förvaltningsområde, informera därför gärna om du är finskspråkig.

title: System Specialist
description:
At Tele2 we work hard to fulfill our commitment to lead in sustainability, being named a climate leader in Europe by The Financial Times. Sweden’s most sustainable company and ranked 37th globally by Time Magazine and Statista on their inaugural World’s Most Sustainable Companies list, featuring 500 companies from more than 30 countries. We keep reaching new goals as we are bound to shift to a circular economy, and we help our customers to do this too.
   

  

 Our Values; Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficient.
   

  

**NÅGRA ORD FRÅN REKRYTERANDE CHEF**
*Så kul att du är nyfiken tjänsten i mitt Team. Hos oss kommer du att få arbeta med uppgifter som har stor betydelse för många människor i vårt land.*
*Dina kollegor kommer att finnas över hela Sverige, från norr till söder.*
*De är ett gäng systemspecialister med lång erfarenhet, hög kompetens och framför allt väldigt trevliga kollegor som likt företaget präglas av flexibilitet, prestigelöshet och ett högt engagemang! Jag ser fram emot att läsa din ansökan!*
 På Tele2 händer det ständigt nya saker och vi står nu inför en intressant resa framåt. Vi har Sveriges mest expansiva nät och flera av Sveriges största organisationer som kunder. Vi skräddarsyr telefonilösningar med plattformar från ledande leverantörer till våra företagskunder. Artvise är en av våra prioriterade lösningar för contact-center, ärendehantering och E-tjänster. Det är en dynamisk miljö och vi har roligt på vägen, men vi klarar det inte själva. Därför söker vi nu en systemspecialist till vårt Artvise team!
   

  

**ROLLEN:**
 Som specialist kliver du raka vägen in i ett av våra viktigaste team. Tillsammans ansvarar ni för samhällsbärande funktioner, som ligger i framkant när det gäller systemintegration inom tele- och datakommunikation med Artvise som plattform. Du kommer att arbeta med kunden i centrum och tillsammans med Sveriges skickligaste specialister inom området. Låter det spännande? Läs vidare!
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifterna innefattar att:**
* Ingå i tekniska/konsultativa projekt
* Arbeta med utveckling och konsulttjänster kring kundens lösning i nära kundkontakt.
* Delta i eller bedriva förstudier där man behöver förstå kundernas behov för att kunna erbjuda relevanta lösningar.
* Supportera i felsökning och felavhjälpning.


 Tjänsten utgår i förstahand från Kista, Malmö eller Göteborg. Hybrid-/distansarbete till viss grad. Resor förekommer inom landet. Beredskapsarbete ingår i tjänsten.
   

  

**VEM DU ÄR:**
 För att trivas i rollen bör du ha intresse och förmåga att utveckla och förvalta våra kundrelationer. Därför känner du stort engagemang för det du gör och har en naturlig vana att jobba med service och support. Våra kunder finns inom offentlig sektor, olika företagssegment och branscher, vilket ger en stor variation i arbetet men som även kräver förmåga att prioritera, analysera samt en lyhördhet och förståelse för olika kundbehov. Att du vill utveckla och utvecklas med ditt arbete ser vi som en självklarhet. Likaså en nyfikenhet och intresse för telefoni och teknik.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har:**
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom, eller motsvarande erfarenhet av tele-/datakom och systemutveckling.
* Erfarenhet av systemintegration med contact-center och/eller ärendehanteringssystem.
* Förståelse för tex Rest, Json, .Net, Xml
* Kunskap inom nätverk, SIP och telekom
* Kunskap inom Microsoft Server, VM Ware och SQL.
* Tidigare erfarenhet av integrationsprojekt rörande AI är meriterande.
* Meriterande att ha tidigare erfarenhet av ärendehanteringssystem eller E-tjänster
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Head of Strategic Operations
description:
**TL;DR:**
 Be the CEO’s and CFO’s go-to problem solver for Lovable’s highest-priority strategic challenges. You’ll operate as the company’s first Strategic Operations hire — deploying into critical gaps that don’t have a clear owner, executing end-to-end, and leaving behind a function or process that runs without you. Examples include international market entry, operationalizing strategic partnerships, and standing up new internal capabilities. You start as an individual contributor and build a team of exceptional generalists over time.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* Business generalist with range: You’ve done multiple tours across different functions — strategy, ops, finance, partnerships, go-to-market — and have the judgment to know what “good” looks like in each. You context-switch effortlessly and bring structure to ambiguity.
* Pragmatic executor, not a politician: You are liked and respected across an organization but not afraid to break glass when needed. You challenge every assumption, ship fast, and don’t stack suboptimal decisions. You’d rather deliver an outcome than present a deck about one.
* Technical and data-driven: Strong analytical skills. Comfortable with data (SQL, BI tools, or equivalent). You use AI tools and agents to automate work and move faster. Preference for technical degrees or deep technical exposure.
* High-slope learner: You learn faster than anyone around you, take ownership immediately, and thrive in low-structure environments. You go from 0→1 and then 1→10.
* Experience: 10+ years of broad-ranging experience. Likely includes a foundation in management consulting (MBB) or banking/PE, but not a prerequisite — what matters is structured thinking, executive presence, and a track record of outsized results. Startup or high-growth experience is a strong plus.


**What You’ll Do**
* Own special projects end-to-end: When the executive team identifies a critical gap or opportunity — entering a new international market, standing up a new function, launching a cross-functional initiative — you take full ownership. You scope it, execute it, hire the permanent leader if needed, and move on to the next one.
* Build the Strategic Operations function: Recruit and develop a small team of exceptional generalists that serves as a rapid-deployment capability for Lovable’s most important priorities. Use AI and automation to build an operating model that’s as fast and AI-native as the product itself.


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: IT-säkerhetsspecialist till Försvarsmaktens cyberförsvar i Stockholm
description:
**Vill du värna om Sverige och vår rätt att leva som vi själva väljer i en digitaliserad värld?**
 Attacker över internet mot datorer och servrar sker världen över i allt större omfattning. Effekterna av en cyberattack kan få lika stora konsekvenser för samhällsviktiga funktioner som ett konventionellt väpnat angrepp.
   

  

 Försvarsmakten är en organisation i ständig utveckling för att alltid vara beredda att värna om Sveriges okränkbara frihet. Vi är beredda att göra det som krävs, även i de svåraste av situationer.
   

  

 Försvarsmakten söker nu IT-säkerhetsspecialister för att stärka vårt cyberförsvar. Med utökad kompetens inom cybersäkerhet förstärker vi förmågan att förstå olika sårbarheter eller cyberhot och kan snabbt agera med en lämplig motåtgärd.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har en önskan att aktivt bidra till Sveriges förmåga och utveckling inom cyberförsvaret.
   

  

**Om befattningen**
 Inom digital forensik och incidenthantering (DFIR) möjliggör vi en snabb och målinriktad hantering av olika typer av uppdrag. Genom att inhämta och analysera data från digitala informationsbärare skapar vi en djup förståelse för specifika hot, för att kunna iscensätta lämpliga åtgärder, t.ex. stoppa vidare exploatering.
   

  

 Tjänsten som IT-säkerhetsspecialist hos oss är krävande och varierande vilket ställer krav på självständighet och förmåga att anpassa sig. Vi tillhandahåller individuellt anpassad och kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling vilket är en förutsättning för att lyckas med vårt uppdrag.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Säkra och extrahera data från olika typer av digitala informationsbärare
* Bearbeta och analysera stora datamängder
* Sammanställa och presentera resultat med ett kvalificerat tekniskt djup både muntligt och skriftligt
* Bidra till verksamhetens kontinuerliga utvecklings- och förbättringsarbete


**Kvalifikationer**
* Akademisk utbildning inom IT-säkerhet, datateknik eller annan relevant utbildning/arbetslivserfarenhet
* Erfarenhet av inhämtning, strukturering och analysering av data från olika digitala informationsbärare
* God förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av att analysera filsystem, minnesdumpar och/eller nätverkstrafik
* Incidenthantering inom IT
* Analys av skadlig kod
* Erfarenhet i något programmeringsspråk
* Intresse av AI-utveckling
* Språkkunskaper utöver svenska och engelska
* B-körkort


**Personliga kvalifikationer**
 För att lyckas i rollen krävs det att du är ansvarstagande och tar initiativ för att bidra till att uppnå efterfrågat resultat i arbetet. Vi ser också att du har stark integritet, är lyhörd och arbetar med precision. Du är analytisk och genuint intresserad av cyberdomänen och kan prioritera mellan operativt resultat och eget lärande. Du kan på ett naturligt sätt växla mellan att arbeta självständigt och i grupp. Du är förändringsbenägen och självgående utifrån vad situationen kräver och möjliggör. För att trivas hos oss behöver du ha ett högt säkerhetsmedvetande och tillämpa ett kritiskt och sakligt förhållningssätt i ditt arbete.
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Du bör inte berätta att du sökt tjänst hos Försvarsmakten för andra personer än dina närmst berörda. Anledningen till att vi ber dig vara återhållsam med information är att det finns tjänster inom området som omfattas av sekretess.
   

  

 För anställning vid Försvarsmakten krävs svenskt medborgarskap och anställningen innebär nationell och internationell arbetsskyldighet.
   

  

 Arbete på annan ort samt beredskap och skiftarbete kan förekomma.
   

  

 Resor i tjänsten kan förekomma både nationellt och internationellt.
   

  

 Anställningsformen är tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders provanställning om du inte är anställd inom Försvarsmakten.
   

  

 Placeringsort för tjänsten är Stockholm.
   

  

 Tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Frågor om tjänsten mejlas till cyberintresse@mil.se
   

  

 Din ansökan vill vi ha senast 26/4 - 2026. Ansökan med meritförteckning skickas till:
   

  

 cyberintresse@mil.se, ange referens 61546. Eller via brev till: Försvarsmakten Högkvarteret/FST STRA Cyber, Att EWI, Lidingövägen 24, 107 85 Stockholm. Märk kuvertet ”Ansökan” och ange annonsens referens.
   

  

 , -------------------------------------------------------- Information om Försvarsmakten och det rekryterande förbandet: I Högkvarteret (HKV) finns överbefälhavaren (ÖB) och generaldirektören (GD), vilka för närvarande har ungefär 1 000 medarbetare – både yrkesofficerare och civila experter. Högkvarteret utgörs av ledningsstaben, produktionsledningen, insatsledningen och militära underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänsten. I ledningsstaben ingår bland annat ekonomidirektören, personaldirektören, kommunikationsdirektören och chefsjuristen. Varje dag och varje timme gör våra medarbetare insatser som påverkar andra människors liv, både i stort och smått, och både på hemmaplan och runt om i världen. Försvarsmakten ger dig möjlighet att utvecklas som människa och växa i din professionella roll. Vi är en ansvarstagande arbetsgivare och har en öppen organisation där vi ställer upp för varandra. I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Professionell utveckling och personlig hälsa värdesätts och uppmuntras. Det finns goda förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet, friskvård och bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Försvarsmakten tillvaratar de kvaliteter som mångfald och jämn könsfördelning tillför verksamheten. Vi välkomnar därför sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter i våra rekryteringar. En anställning hos oss innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. I anställningen ingår även en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands. Innebörden av detta varierar beroende på typ av befattning. Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: IAM Project Manager
description:
**About Justera Group**
 Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.
   

  

**About the Role:**
 Justera is currently seeking a highly organized and technically-minded IAM Project Manager on behalf of our client, a major player in the Retail & E-commerce sector.
   

  

 This is a critical mid-level assignment focused on the end-to-end delivery of Identity and Access Management (IAM) solutions. You will be the driving force behind a technical cross-functional team, ensuring that security policies and processes align perfectly with business value. If you thrive in a non-hierarchical, fast-paced environment and possess a "doer" mentality, this is the project for you.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* End-to-End Ownership: Lead the full project lifecycle from ideation and MVP definition to optimization and delivery.
* Strategic Planning: Establish the project mission and OKRs, translating them into a prioritized roadmap and team backlog.
* Team Leadership: Lead a technical cross-functional team of engineers, fostering a culture of collaboration, transparency, and trust.
* IAM Strategy: Identify opportunities to improve IAM policies, processes, and documentation.
* Stakeholder Management: Manage relationships across project teams to ensure seamless collaboration and alignment.
* Continuous Improvement: Coach the organization on IAM best practices and address system issues as they arise.
* Backlog Management: Utilize Jira to manage priorities and strategically de-scope tasks to ensure rapid feedback cycles.


**Requirements:**
* Mid-level experience in Project Management within tech development.
* Solid understanding of Directory Services (Active Directory, Azure AD, B2B/B2C, Microsoft Entra).
* Proven track record in roadmap development, OKR creation, and MVP definition.
* Experience leading technical teams with complex dependencies and custom-built solutions.
* Full professional proficiency in English.
* Analytical, structured, and pragmatic with a "hands-on" approach to problem-solving.
* Nice to Have:
+ Experience with IAM/PAM solutions such as SailPoint, Saviynt, One Identity, or CyberArk.
+ Specific knowledge of Microsoft Azure AD Identity Governance.
+ Proficiency in Jira.
+ Previous experience within Retail or E-commerce sectors.


**Logistics:**
* Assignment Type: Consultant Contract.
* Location: Stockholm, Sweden.
* Work Model: Hybrid (Requirement of 4 days per week on-site).
* Allocation: 100%.
* Duration: 6 months - Starting May 2026 (w/possible extension after October 2026).


**What We Offer:**
* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Forward Deployed Geospatial Engineer - SAR Intelligence
description:
**Role highlights:**
* Role: Forward Deployed Engineer - SAR Intelligence
* Department: Forward Deployed Engineering
* Location: Finland, Sweden, Netherlands, Poland, UAE, Germany (Must be based in-country)
* Reports to: VP, Forward Deployed Engineering
* Working type: Hybrid (On-site at customer locations approx. 50% of time)
* Must be eligible and able to attain relevant national and NATO security clearances at the highest level.


**The Mission of the Forward Deployed Geospatial Engineer**
 In this role, you will bridge the gap between SAR physics and operational intelligence—ensuring defense and intelligence customers extract maximum tactical value from ICEYE's satellite imagery. Embedded with intelligence analysts and military operators, you'll operationalize ICEYE's ISR Suite, configure automated detection workflows, and translate raw SAR data into actionable intelligence that delivers immediate situational awareness across maritime and land domains.
   

  

**Who are we?**
 ICEYE delivers space-based intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) capabilities to governments and allied nations. This includes sovereign and turnkey ISR missions leveraging ICEYE's world-leading synthetic aperture radar (SAR) satellite technology, as well as access to data from the world's largest SAR satellite constellation. These capabilities enable partners to detect and respond to critical changes anywhere on Earth with unprecedented speed and accuracy - day or night and in any weather, supported by ultra high-resolution imagery and high-frequency revisits.
   

  

 As a trusted partner for defense, intelligence, security, and maritime domain awareness, ICEYE's near real-time data creates a tactical advantage for mission-critical operations. ICEYE operates internationally with offices in Finland, Poland, Spain, Japan, the UAE, Greece, Germany, and the US. The company has more than 900 employees, inspired by the shared vision of improving life on Earth by becoming the global source of truth in Earth Observation.
   

  

**Day to day responsibilities:**
**SAR Data Operationalization**
* Train and support intelligence analysts using SAR imagery for tactical missions (maritime, ground, infrastructure).
* Configure and optimize ICEYE ISR Suite for customer use cases and mission-relevant outputs.
* QA/validate SAR imagery products to meet operational requirements.


**Custom Geospatial Workflows**
* Develop Python geospatial automation (GDAL, Rasterio, NumPy) tailored to customer needs.
* Integrate ICEYE SAR data into customer COP environments (ArcGIS, QGIS, proprietary platforms).
* Implement automated detection/alerting for priority intelligence requirements (e.g., dark vessels, border anomalies, change detection).


**Customer Engagement & Training**
* Serve as SAR/geospatial SME for defense and intelligence customers.
* Deliver training on SAR fundamentals, interpretation, and platform capabilities.
* Provide embedded, real-time analytical support on watch floors/ops centers during missions.


**Product Feedback & Innovation**
* Capture operational feedback and translate into actionable product/engineering requirements.
* Document use cases, methods, and best practices for team reuse.
* Surface opportunities for new capabilities aligned to mission needs.


**Requirements**
**Must have skills:**
* Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) or equivalent experience in Remote Sensing, Geophysics, GIS, Geography, or related technical field.
* Understanding of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) physics, including polarimetry, interferometry, and imaging modes.
* Strong programming skills in Python for geospatial and earth observation data processing (GDAL, Rasterio, NumPy, GeoPandas).
* Hands-on experience analyzing and interpreting satellite imagery for intelligence or operational applications.
* Proven ability to translate complex technical concepts into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
* Excellent communication skills in English (written & spoken) with ability to deliver effective training and technical presentations.
* Willingness to travel 30-50% to customer sites within the region.


**Nice To Have Skills**
* Experience working in defense, intelligence, or government operational environments.
* Familiarity with maritime domain awareness (AIS data, vessel detection, port monitoring).
* Experience with change detection, object detection, or automated feature extraction from satellite imagery.
* Knowledge of geospatial data standards and formats (GeoTIFF, COG, GeoJSON, KML).
* Understanding of military intelligence collection requirements and processes (PIR, CCIRs).


**Application process**
* Talent Acquisition Interview
* Hiring Manager Interview
* Technical Interview (onsite or virtual), including a Technical Challenge
* Hiring Team Interview
* Offer Decision


**How We Work (Our Values)**
**Make the impossible possible:** 
 We set ambitious goals and stay calm under pressure. We bring grit, optimism, and ownership when things get hard, and we keep moving until we find a way.
   

  

* Be curious: Go deep, ask questions, listen carefully, and think critically. Understand the "why" behind decisions.
* See the big picture: Stay close to what's happening across the company so you can make better decisions. Consider how your work affects others.
* Drive effective teamwork: Create psychological safety, invite different perspectives, and build inclusive teams. There are no bad questions.
* Act as one team: We win together. We match tasks to the right owner and stay agile as priorities shift.
* Have fun: What we do matters—and it should be enjoyable. Celebrate progress, take pride in results, and share the wins.


**Benefits**
 Our benefits are designed to support your health and wellbeing—at work and beyond. We keep improving them based on employee feedback, and offerings vary by location. Talent Acquisition will confirm what applies for this role and location during the process.
   

  

**Our commitment to Diversity, Equity and Inclusion**
 We want ICEYE to be a place where people can be themselves and do great work. Different backgrounds and perspectives make us stronger, which is why we work to create an environment where people feel included, respected, and able to speak up. Whatever your background, we want you to bring your authentic self to the table.
   

  

 We're committed to fair, inclusive hiring and equal opportunity. Everyone is welcome to apply. If you need any adjustments or support during the recruitment process, tell us—we'll do our best to help.
   

  

 Apply now to start your ICEYE journey, and help us continue to make the impossible possible together. Read more about ICEYE and working with us at iceye.com.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love making things work. You're not in love with a specific solution or technology, but rather delivering value to users.
   

  

 At Tandem, Forward Deployed Engineers are the ones who bridge the gap between
 *the product demo* 
 and
 *real clinicians delivering better more efficient care* 
 . You’ll take on whatever stands in the way of our product’s real-world impact, debugging integrations, tweaking deployments, writing code to fill the gaps, and making sure everything runs smoothly in our customers’ environments. The learnings and abstractions you build along the way will set the foundation for the next generation of the product offering.
   

  

 Making things work for real is often messy & painful - but that’s what makes it fun! The prestige comes from happy customers not using the latest shiny dev tool.
   

  

 You’ll see firsthand how the tech you build actually changes how healthcare works, and you’ll become one of the people that truly understand both the technical and operational sides of what we do.
   

  

 This role is perfect for someone who’s obsessed with solving problems, who codes because they love it, and who cares more about
 *impact* 
 than tech stack. It’s a role for builders - people with founder energy, who want to learn fast, ship fast, and see their work make a difference immediately.
   

  

 If that sounds like you, we’d love to meet you.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Work with deploying, integrating, and optimizing our product in customer environments.
* Debug and solve complex, real-world problems across infrastructure, APIs, data flows, RPA, and configuration.
* Write clean, pragmatic code to adapt and extend our systems for each unique use case.
* Collaborate directly with clinicians, partners, and our internal teams to remove blockers and make deployments seamless.
* Shape the next generation of our product such that the next rollout delivers more value, more smoothly.
* Continuously identify, automate, and improve the painful parts of deployment so we can scale smarter next time.


**What You Bring**
* Deep love for programming and problem-solving.
* Curiosity that borders on obsession - you like understanding why things work (or don’t).
* A bias toward action - you’d rather get things done than talk about them.
* Comfort working in ambiguity and high velocity.
* A mindset that leans toward ownership, creativity, and future-founder energy.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience integrating or deploying complex products in healthcare.
* Any other language skills than a fluency in English is a plus, especially German.
* Solid experience coding in Python, TypeScript, or C#.
* Experience with Robotic Process Automation (RPA) in the web or Windows context.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of 4 stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, a presentation and som pair programming to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: IT-Säkerhetsspecialist, System Safety Engineer
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

**Vi söker en IT-Säkerhetsspecialist, System Safety Engineer**
**Uppdragsbeskrivning:**
 Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.
   

  

**Din roll**
 I den här rollen får du möjlighet att spela en avgörande roll i utvecklingen av avancerade produkter, där IT-säkerhet är en central del. Du kommer att arbeta med att delta i design av systemlösningar för att skydda både information och teknologi. Det innebär att tolka krav, analysera systemlösningar samt dokumentera detta.
   

  

 Du kommer att vara med och forma systemarkitekturen genom hela processen, från att förstå krav till att realisera produkter. Du kommer att vara en viktig del i att leverera säkra och hållbara lösningar. Med din expertis inom IT-säkerhet kommer du att arbeta proaktivt med att säkerställa att produkterna följer de krav och regelverk som gäller, samtidigt som du bidrar med din erfarenhet i riskanalyser och säkerhetsbedömningar.
   

  

 I en agil arbetsmiljö får du möjligheten att samarbeta med erfarna kollegor och vara i ständig dialog med intressenter.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**
* Analysera krav och säkerställ att de möter både säkerhetsstandarder och relevanta regelverk
* Definiera och specificera systemkrav för projekten
* Dokumentera och redovisa säkerhetslösningar på ett tydligt sätt
* Genomföra riskanalyser inom IT-säkerhet
* Utveckla och designa IT-säkerhetslösningar för att säkerställa efterlevnad av krav och regelverk


**Din profil**
 För att trivas i denna roll är du en självgående och kommunikativ person som är van vid att samarbeta effektivt med både teammedlemmar och andra intressenter. Du är strukturerad och har ett självsäkert tankesätt som gör att du kan anpassa dig till förändrade omständigheter.
   

  

 Du söker ett långsiktigt åtagande och är nyfiken på att utvecklas i en föränderlig miljö. Du har god samarbetsförmåga och kan samtidigt stå på dig när det behövs.
   

  

**Erforderliga färdigheter:**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av att bedöma IT-säkerhet för komplexa system, inklusive både hård- och mjukvara
* Förmåga att argumentera för och främja relevanta lösningar
* God analytisk förmåga
* God förmåga att tolka och skriva teknisk information
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska
* Tekniska ledaregenskaper


**Meriterande:**
* Kandidatexamen inom ingenjörsvetenskap eller datavetenskap, gärna med fokus på IT-säkerhet
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetskritiska system
* Certifieringar som Security+, CISSP, CEH eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av arbete med säkerhetsprodukter
* Erfarenhet av ackreditering


 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För vissa uppdrag kan krav på specifikt medborgarskap förekomma.
   

  

 Vänligen observera att vi arbetar med löpande urval och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum har gått ut.
   

  

**Ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-04-24
   

  

**Startdatum:** 
 ASAP
   

  

**Slutdatum:** 
 Öppet
   

  

**Ansökan:**
 Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande.
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen och dina svar ligger till grund för urvalet. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Vänligen notera att alla krav och meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: PRODUCT MANAGER
description:
**Product Manager Commerce Media**
 SAS is scaling its commerce media capabilities across digital and inflight channels, creating a unique opportunity to help build and shape a growing business area where we are looking for a Product Manager to drive the new area of Commerce Media. A key part of this journey is the development of new inflight advertising experiences enabled by high-speed Starlink connectivity, opening entirely new ways to create value, optimize ad delivery, and unlocking significant new revenue streams in the air.
   

  

**Challenges you will work on**
 As Product Manager for Commerce Media, you will translate commercial strategy into product execution by owning and evolving the roadmap and backlog in a fast-moving environment. You will work closely with Digital/IT, Brand & Marketing, Partnerships, Digital Sales, Inflight, and Analytics to align priorities and deliver on shared goals. You will also manage and improve SAS’s ad tech setup, including inventory, targeting, and how workflows are set up between internal teams and external Ad Ops.
   

  

 You will lead the work to develop and scale Starlink-enabled inflight advertising, including defining how ads are set up, used, and improved to increase usage and revenue over time. This role offers the exciting opportunity to shape and build the full media commerce strategy for SAS, defining how we scale, optimize, and unlock long-term value across all channels.
   

  

**This is a 14-month fixed-term role, with the potential for extension based on the continued success of the project.**
**Key Responsibilities**
* Own and prioritize the roadmap and backlog, and ensure ongoing delivery of key initiatives
* Lead development of Starlink-based inflight advertising, from setup to scaled use
* Improve how inventory is used and how ads are targeted and delivered across digital and inflight channels
* Work with pricing and ad formats to support revenue growth across platforms
* Manage the ad tech setup, including inventory, targeting, and workflows across teams and Ad Ops
* Define KPIs, follow up on performance, and use data to make improvements
* Lead testing and QA of new features to ensure stable and reliable releases
* Support internal teams with clear documentation and ways of working
* Identify and implement improvements that increase efficiency and commercial output


**The Team**
 You’ll join a growing Digital Sales team within eCommerce, responsible for driving digital revenue through performance marketing, optimization of our web and app channels, SEO/SEM, and data-driven analytics. We work closely with Digital/IT, Brand & Marketing, Partnerships, Inflight, and Analytics, and the wider Commercial organization to deliver aligned, high-impact initiatives. Together, we’re building a modern and scalable digital ecosystem that supports SAS’s global commercial goals.
   

  

**To be successful, we believe you have**
* Experience within commerce media, ad-tech, or digital advertising, with a strong focus on monetization and data-driven products
* Experience in a product role (e.g. Product Manager, Product Owner, or similar), ideally in a data- or revenue-driven environment
* Strong analytical skills with experience defining KPIs, tracking performance, and driving decisions based on data
* A solid understanding of digital advertising, including inventory, targeting, and campaign delivery
* Experience translating business needs into product requirements, user stories, and roadmaps
* Strong collaboration skills and experience working with cross-functional teams such as Tech, Analytics, and Commercial stakeholders
* Experience with analytics tools such as GA4, Looker, or similar
* Hands-on experience with ad tech platforms such as ad servers, SSPs, DSPs, or retail media platforms


**It’s a plus if you also have**
* Familiarity with QA, testing, and product delivery processes
* Experience working closely with Sales or revenue-focused teams


 As a person, we believe you are structured, analytical, and comfortable bringing clarity to complex environments. You are a strong collaborator who can align multiple stakeholders and communicate in a clear and pragmatic way. You have a problem-solving mindset and are comfortable handling both strategic and operational challenges. In a fast-moving environment, you prioritize effectively, stay organized, and drive steady progress with a strong focus on delivery and impact.
   

  

**Why SAS?**
**Benefits**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik (Stockholm) offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


**Our Culture**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 23 April 2026. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we cannot handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: As soon as possible
* Position: Temporary position (100%) for 14 months
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite. Remote work may also be an option, depending on the agreement made with your manager.
* To be eligible for this position, you need an EU-work permit. Please note that we ask you to inform us if you currently have a valid EU-work permit.


 Come and fly with us!

title: Full Stack Product Engineer
description:
**FULL STACK PRODUCT ENGINEER — EXAKT STOCKHOLM** 




  





***Corporate merch is a billion-dollar market still running on spreadsheets and phone calls.***




***We're changing that. Want in?***




  





 Every major brand in the world buys merchandise — branded goods, staff kits, product launches, global campaigns. It's a massive, fast-growing market. And a lot of it is still managed the old way: manually, slowly, with no real digital infrastructure connecting the pieces.
 



  





 Exakt has been at the centre of that market since 2004, working with brands like Samsung, Absolut and Electrolux. We've built the platform foundation. Now we're building the layer on top, the part that makes this industry genuinely work differently. There's no off-the-shelf solution for what we're making.
 



  





 The interesting part isn't just the automation. It's knowing exactly where the process breaks, and building something smart enough to remove those obstacles before anyone runs into them.
 



  





 The role in plain terms
 



 Full stack across TypeScript and React on the frontend, Node APIs in the middle, and a MedusaJS headless commerce backend — all running on GCP with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Prisma underneath. Terraform for infra, Clerk for auth, Stripe for payments.
 



  





**Required** 
 :
 


* Typescript
* React
* PostgreSQL
* Git
* Google Cloud Platform or equivalent



**Nice to have** 
 :
 


* MedusaJS
* Terraform
* NextJS
* Redis
* Clerk
* Stripe
* Prisma



  





 Real product influence, your decisions shape how this works, long term
 



 High autonomy, high responsibility, no micromanagement, but no hand-holding either
 



  





**This is probably not for you if** 




*You need detailed specs before you can move* 




*You prefer a large team with clearly defined lanes* 




*You're not interested in the business side of what you're building* 




  





 Timing
 



 We're ready to move fast. Team is in place, stack is running, and we can have you building within days. If you're available now or soon — let's talk!
 



  





 Location
 



 We're based on Lidingö — only 3km from Subwaystation Ropsten and Värtan, just across the bridge. We're also looking at finding new office in Frihamnen next year.
 



  






 funatwork@exakt.se

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
**⚡️ What We Do**
 Flower is Flexible Power. We are a next-gen energy company leveraging AI and machine learning to make renewable energy stable and always available – even when the sun isn’t shining and the wind isn’t blowing.
   

  

 Through smart optimization and trading of energy assets like wind and solar farms, battery systems, and EV chargers, we make renewable energy reliable and predictable, leading the charge towards the energy system of tomorrow.
   

  

**🌟 Who We Are**
 Tech company at heart. Purpose-driven at core. Flower consists of a diverse group of innovative individuals with a strong desire to improve the state of the world.
   

  

 At Flower, we believe trust, collaboration and diversity are essential to not only create an inclusive work environment, but also drive career growth. By embracing varying perspectives, we allow creativity and progress to flourish.
   

  

 To accelerate towards our goal of becoming the pioneering force powering the energy system of tomorrow, we are now looking for a passionate and skilled Senior Product Manager.
   

  

**👩‍💻 About The Role**
 We’re hiring a Senior Product Manager to act as a force multiplier across Flower’s product portfolio. You won’t own a single backlog. You’ll shape the bets we make, set product direction, and raise the standard of how we decide what to build - across prediction, optimization, trading, and platform capabilities. You’ll work closely with engineers, energy market experts, and commercial teams - not to coordinate their work, but to sharpen it. The energy transition is one of the defining infrastructure challenges in Europe. This is a chance to shape it from the inside.
   

  

 Our optimization engine allocates battery capacity across energy and balancing markets, prices flexibility against its opportunity cost, and dispatches assets in real time as conditions shift. You’ll help shape what this system becomes: which capabilities to build, how to sequence them across markets and geographies, and where to make deliberate bets versus where to stay disciplined.
   

  

 We use a Shape Up-inspired methodology - fixed cycles, cool-down weeks, co-shaped pitches with defined appetite. We chose this because you can’t build a world-class optimization engine by spreading effort across everything at once.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Shape product bets. Find the highest-leverage problems, frame them clearly, and define what a good solution looks like - then leave room for the team to figure out how.
* Own outcomes, not outputs. You’re accountable for whether initiatives deliver measurable business value.
* Bring commercial context to technical decisions. Spend real time with traders and commercial teams, then translate that understanding into better product choices.
* Collaborate deeply with engineering. Not by writing tickets, but by thinking together about what to build and what to leave out
* Set direction and communicate it. Own the roadmap, run the operating cadence, and make trade-offs legible across the business.


**What You Won't Do**
 Manage a team. Groom a backlog. Spend your days in status meetings. We use Linear, Shape Up, and docs over tickets.
   

  

**Who You Are**
*We’re not looking for a particular background. We’re looking for a particular way of thinking.*
* 5+ years in product roles, with at least some of that time at companies where product management is taken seriously as a discipline.
* You think in outcomes and tradeoffs, not features and timelines. You’re comfortable making decisions with imperfect information.
* Strong independent thinker. You don’t wait for permission to solve problems, and you hold yourself to a higher bar than anyone else would set for you.
* You can hold your own in technical discussions - not writing code, but understanding systems and architecture well enough to have a real opinion.
* Intellectually curious. Energy markets are deep, complex, and full of structural shifts. You’ll need to learn this domain, and you’re excited by that.
* You use AI tools to go deeper and move faster - whether that's exploring data, testing ideas, or getting into territory that used to require a specialist.
* Fluent in English. Clear and precise in writing and speaking.


**It’s a bonus if you**
* Have direct experience in energy, fintech, or other complex, regulated industries.
* Have a background that blends analytical rigor with product intuition - ex-consultants, ex-traders, or technical PMs who broadened into strategy.
* Have experience with Shape Up, or a strong opinion on why most agile processes create more overhead than value.
* Have worked with systems where the optimization problem is the product.


 📍
 **Location**
 Our beautiful office is located in the heart of Södermalm, just a short walk from Slussen subway station. We encourage in-office collaboration but support a hybrid work model.
   

  

 ✉️
 **Apply**
 Our corporate language is English, as we have over 30 nationalities in the office. We therefore appreciate it if you could submit your CV in English.
   

  

 📌
 **What to expect**
 We respond to every application. The process has four stages:
   

  

* Application review - we review all applications thoughtfully and keep the process moving with timely updates.
* Introductory conversation - with our Talent team. Mutual fit, expectations, and any questions you have about Flower.
* Hiring Manager conversation - a deeper discussion about how you think about product, your experience, and what you’d bring to this role.
* Team conversations - you’ll meet members of the Product and Engineering teams and work through a real problem together.


 We design the process to be smooth and well-paced, respecting your time and maintaining momentum throughout.
   

  

*We kindly but firmly decline any engagement in recruitment assistance for our hiring processes. This includes partnership offers or the sale of recruitment tools.*

title: IT-säkerhetsspecialist
description:
Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Driva och vidareutveckla sårbarhetshantering – från identifiering till hantering
* Implementera och utveckla moderna säkerhetslösningar inom bank och finans
* Bidra till incidenthantering och förbättrad detektion som del av SIRT


 Att jobba som IT-säkerhetsspecialist
   

  

 I rollen som IT-säkerhetsspecialist arbetar du brett inom IT-säkerhet med ett tydligt tekniskt fokus. Du rör dig mellan modern moln- och plattformsteknik och en äldre infrastruktur som successivt fasas ut. Tillsammans med teamet driver du säkerhetsarbetet framåt genom att bygga, förbättra och automatisera säkerhetsförmågor som gör verklig skillnad i vardagen.
   

  

 Rollen är varierad och kombinerar tekniskt säkerhetsarbete med kontinuerlig förbättring och utveckling. I rollen kommer du bland annat att arbeta med sårbarhetshantering, från identifiering och analys till riskbaserad prioritering och uppföljning i nära samverkan med verksamhet och IT. Du arbetar nära teknik, data och kod och använder exempelvis Python och automatisering för att effektivisera säkerhetsprocesser, integrera verktyg och minska manuellt arbete. AI och nya arbetssätt är naturliga delar i hur vi utvecklar säkerheten framåt.
   

  

 Du kommer även att arbeta med och vidareutveckla säkerhetslösningar som exempelvis sårbarhetsskanning, SIEM, IDS, WAF, Endpoint Protection och DDoS-skydd. Rollen innefattar även deltagande i vårt Security Incident Response Team (SIRT), där du bidrar med teknisk analys vid incidenter och är med och utvecklar vår larm- och detektionsförmåga. Utöver detta ingår omvärldsbevakning och arbete med Cyber Threat Intelligence, där du hjälper till att identifiera nya hot, trender och sårbarheter som är relevanta för bank- och finanssektorn.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett erfaret och kunnigt team där tekniska diskussioner, kunskapsdelning och kontinuerlig utveckling är en självklar del av vardagen. Du har stor frihet att påverka både arbetssätt och din egen utveckling.
   

  

 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen tror vi att du:
   

  

* har flera års erfarenhet av IT-säkerhet med stark teknisk förankring
* har god förståelse för sårbarhetshantering, risker och tekniska beroenden
* är bekväm med Python, scripting och automatisering (eller stark vilja att fördjupa dig)
* är nyfiken på hur AI och nya tekniker kan användas för att förbättra säkerhetsarbete
* är självgående, analytisk och trivs i en miljö med högt tempo och förändring
* gillar att utmana både dig själv och befintliga lösningar
* kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska i tal och skrift


 Vi gillar att ses- det är en del av vår kultur. Till våren flyttar vi in på Drottninggatan 89, ett kontor som ger plats för både fokus och gemenskap, med stadens puls precis utanför dörren.
   

  

 Har du check på allt?
   

  

* Analytisk
* Kommunikativ
* Nytänkande
* Prestigelös
* Samarbetsförmåga

title: Backend Engineer, Security
description:
Security engineers at Spotify protect the security of Spotify’s platform and of our 700+ million users. We are looking for an experienced engineer to join us in securing the most important engineering initiatives at Spotify.
   

  

 We are looking for a backend software engineer to join our security compliance engineering team. We are hiring engineers who are enthusiastic about security and compliance, and who enjoy transforming large, complex problems into actionable, scalable, and reliable software solutions.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design products, services, and infrastructure that support and strengthen our technical security Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) strategy
* Build infrastructure and tooling that apply regulatory requirements and security framework controls across our distributed environment
* Help drive scalable and consistent engineering practices that address security, risk, and compliance requirements


 Who You Are
   

  

* You are an experienced software engineer with development experience in an object-oriented programming language such as Java, and you are comfortable with data engineering
* You have experience writing distributed, high-volume services and know how to deploy and operate them in production
* You have a deep understanding of system design, data structures, and algorithms
* You care about quality and you know what it means to ship high quality code
* You have hands-on experience implementing security controls and safeguards in software systems, working within cybersecurity and security GRC frameworks
* You love working in an environment where you frequently discuss technical requirements and iterate quickly
* You are passionate about information security governance, risk and complianceYou have excellent written and verbal communication skills, including extensive experience meeting and presenting to senior leaders and non-technical stakeholders


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London or Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: VMware Engineer
description:
**Är du vår nästa VMware Engineer?**
 Vi söker nu en VMware Engineer till vår kund i stockholm. Vi söker dig som vill utvecklas tillsammans med oss och bidra med din kompetens inom virtualisering och infrastruktur. Hos Nexer Infrastructure får du chansen att arbeta i tekniskt avancerade och affärskritiska miljöer, där tillgänglighet, säkerhet och stabil drift står i fokus. Här kombinerar vi trygghet, långsiktig utveckling och stark gemenskap – samtidigt som vi löser komplexa problem och bygger hållbara plattformar för framtiden.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder dig**
* Trygga anställningsvillkor och fast månadslön
* Långsiktig utvecklingsplan som konsult hos Nexer
* Gemenskap genom aktiviteter som AW:s, föreläsningar och träffar med dina Nexer kollegor
* Möjligheten att jobba med marknadsledande kunder inom olika branscher


**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
 I rollen som VMware Engineer arbetar du med drift, förvaltning och vidareutveckling av virtualiseringsplattformar i både on-prem- och hybridmiljöer. Du blir en central del av infrastrukturen och arbetar nära andra tekniska team samt externa leverantörer.
   

  

 Arbetet omfattar bland annat drift, konfigurering och övervakning av VMware-miljöer baserade på vSphere, vSAN och NSX. Du ansvarar för livscykelhantering, kapacitetsplanering, patchning och uppgraderingar av plattformen, samt arbetar aktivt med felsökning, incident- och problemhantering.
   

  

 En viktig del av rollen är även att bidra till förbättringsarbete och automatisering av återkommande uppgifter, exempelvis med PowerCLI eller andra scriptlösningar. Du dokumenterar lösningar och rutiner och säkerställer att miljön följer gällande säkerhetskrav och arkitekturprinciper i samarbete med säkerhets- och infrastrukturteam.
   

  

**Vi ser gärna att du**
* Har erfarenhet av arbete med VMware-baserade virtualiseringsmiljöer
* Har god kunskap inom vSphere, vCenter, ESXi samt virtualiserade nätverk och lagring
* Har erfarenhet av felsökning, incidenthantering och drift i affärskritiska miljöer
* Har kunskap inom automation och scripting, exempelvis PowerShell/PowerCLI
* Är van att arbeta enligt ITIL-processer (Incident, Problem, Change)
* Behärskar svenska och engelska obehindrat i tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Certifieringar inom VMware, exempelvis VCP eller VCAP
* Erfarenhet av hybridmiljöer (VMware i kombination med Azure eller AWS)
* Erfarenhet av containerplattformar och Kubernetes
* Kunskap om verktyg som vRealize Automation, Log Insight eller Aria Suite


**Vem trivs hos oss?**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du har god analytisk förmåga, tar initiativ och är ihärdig när det gäller felsökning och problemlösning. Vi tror även att du har god samarbetsförmåga och trivs med att arbeta både individuellt och i grupp, eftersom du som konsult kan komma att arbeta i olika sammanhang.
   

  

**Mer om Nexer Infrastructure**
 Nexer Infrastructure (vi hette då Sigma IT Tech) startade sin verksamhet 2018 och är specialister på en sak – talanger inom drift, support och IT-infrastruktur. Vi hjälper företag att växa och att framtidssäkra sin kompetens med hjälp av flexibla konsulttjänster. Bland våra kunder finns många välkända aktörer som är marknadsledande inom sina respektive branscher.
   

  

 Som IT-konsult hos oss blir du väl omhändertagen och vi är måna om att du ska trivas. Vi lägger stor vikt vid att upprätthålla den goda stämningen i vår grupp, bland annat genom gemensamma aktiviteter som föreläsningar, after works och lunchträffar. Blir du konsult hos oss lyssnar vi på dig, dina behov och i vilken riktning du vill utvecklas.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Då urval sker löpande ser vi gärna att du skickar in din ansökan så snart som möjligt. Vi ser fram emot att läsa den!

title: Head of Operational Excellence (Airline)
description:
The Head of Operational Excellence will leverage the newly unified TUI Airline Operations management structure to establish and drive a consistent performance culture throughout the five AOCs and global functions. This role will identify critical performance measures, develop standardised reporting frameworks, and coordinate targeted improvement initiatives, so that TUI Airline can achieve competitive operational outcomes on a global scale and realise the full benefits of integrated operational management.
   

  

 We are happy to consider this opportunity on a hybrid working model basis with a minimum of two days per week in the office required and/or in line with local office attendance requirements, whichever is higher. Some international travel maybe required.
   

  

**Applications close 22 April 2026**
**About Our Offer**
**Personal benefits:** 
 Attractive remuneration, generous travel benefits, extensive health & well-being support, and more
   

  

**Flexible working:** 
 Work is something you do, not somewhere you go. We encourage a healthy work-life balance with a dynamic working environment
   

  

**A career to shape:** 
 Access the TUI Learning Hub to level-up and reach your ambitions
   

  

**Broaden your network:** 
 We champion intercultural collaboration and provide opportunities to work on global projects and teams
   

  

**Community:** 
 Get involved with incredible local charity and sustainability initiatives like the TUI Care Foundation
   

  

**About The Job**
* In collaboration with Operations Committee / Operations Senior Leadership Team (SLT), you will develop, define, implement and regularly review meaningful and competitive operational objectives, establishing measurable key results in line with strategic business goals
* Working with Data Analytics and IT functions you'll develop and publish a comprehensive TUI Airline Operations reporting suite, designing dashboard and metrics to drive Objectives and Key Results (OKR's) that enable accessibility for key stakeholders and ensure data integrity
* In conjunction with leaders from across Operations you'll conduct thorough analysis of operational processes and outcomes, determining critical factors that influence operational excellence and developing insights that can inform strategic decision-making
* Define, resource and mobilise cross-functional projects, developing a short/medium/long term prioritised plan having identified improvement opportunities that will enhance OKR performance. Gaining buy-in and support from Operations Committee / Operations SLT and mobilising expertise from across the Operations organisation to deliver against key projects
* You'll establish an airline base driven performance culture, enthusing and mobilising pilots, cabin crew, and engineers with the creation of Base-level OKRs, driving community engagement in a clear and specific set up, defining daily, weekly, and monthly performance targets and celebrating performance achievements, harnessing internal competitiveness in order to drive a market competitive mind-set
